title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You Anime Reveals 4 More Cast Members, June 3 Limited Advance Streaming on Abema Japan
content: The staff for the television anime of Jinushi 's Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You ( Super no Ura de Yani Sū Futari ) manga revealed a new key visual and four additional cast members on Monday.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll’s Darkest Spring 2026 Anime Is About to Hit Its Most Important Episode Yet (And You Shouldn’t Miss It)
content: Crunchyroll ’s darkest and most intriguing anime of Spring 2026 continues to develop its lore, setting up a pivotal confrontation in the upcoming episode. While dozens of anime are currently airing this season, few truly embrace dark fantasy, with many simply continuing their established premises.
author: ComicBook

title: Manga 'Kagurabachi' Gets TV Anime in Spring 2027
content: The fifth Jump Press livestream event announced a television anime adaptation of Takeru Hokazono 's Kagurabachi manga on Monday, revealing the main cast, staff, teaser promo, and a teaser visual (pictured). The anime series is scheduled to premiere in April 2027.
author: MyAnimeList

title: The Promised Neverland Manga Gets Bonus 1-Shot Chapter This Summer
content: Shueisha 's "Jump Press" livestream on Monday announced that Kaiu Shirai and Posuka Demizu 's The Promised Neverland manga is getting a new bonus one-shot chapter this summer in Shueisha 's Weekly Shonen Jump magazine.
author: ANN

title: Takeru Hokazono's Kagurabachi Manga Gets TV Anime in April 2027
content: Shueisha 's "Jump Press" livestream on Monday announced that Takeru Hokazono 's Kagurabachi manga is getting a television anime adaptation that will debut in April 2027. The anime will star Taihi Kimura as Chihiro Rokuhira. The event also revealed a teaser visual, teaser video, and main staff.
author: ANN

title: It’s Official, Kagurabachi Confirms It’s Finally Getting an Anime in 2027
content: It’s finally official as Kagurabachi has announced it’s getting its own anime adaptation at last. Takeru Hokazono’s manga series first made its debut with Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine back in 2023, and it was one of the most well received debuts in recent memory.
author: ComicBook

title: Kagurabachi Anime Officially Announced for April 2027, Reveals Studio & Production Details
content: Kagurabachi is officially getting an anime adaptation in 2027, with studio Cypic in charge of the animation production. The news were previously reported by Toyo Keizai in December 2024, while the official confirmation arrived today.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi' Unveils Additional Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for Summer 2026
content: The official website of the Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi ( My Mother-in-Law and Sister-in-Law Who Don't Bully Me. ) television anime unveiled additional cast, staff, teaser promo, and the main visual (pictured) on Monday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Rich Girl Caretaker Anime Casts Saori Ōnishi, Rio Tsuchiya
content: The official website for the anime adaptation of author Yusaku Sakaishi and illustrator Sakura Miwabe 's Rich Girl Caretaker ( Saijo no Osewa ) light novel series revealed the anime's key visual and two new cast members on Monday.
author: ANN

title: Additional Cast for 'Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari' Announced
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Jinushi 's Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari ( Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You ) manga announced additional cast and a new key visual on Monday.
author: MyAnimeList
